name: php-codeblock-highlighter-advanced
description: When you have mixed PHP and static-HTML/CSS/JS code in a single .php file, it adds special highlighting for PHP and HTML code blocks

pchAdvanced.backgroundColor.description: Background color for HTML (static) code blocks in rgba() format only.

pchAdvanced.echoBorderColor.description: Border color for inline PHP echo statements (e.g. <?= $var ?>) when mixed with HTML.

pchAdvanced.echoBorderStyle.description: The CSS border style for inline PHP echo statements (e.g., solid, dashed, inset).

pchAdvanced.echoBorderWidth.description: The CSS border width for inline PHP echo statements (e.g., 1px, 2px).

pchAdvanced.echoBorderRadius.description: The CSS border radius for rounding the edges of inline PHP echo statements.

pchAdvanced.echoBackgroundColor.description: Background color for inline echoes. Default is transparent to inherit the HTML line color.

scripts.pretest: npm run compile-tests && npm run compile && npm run lint
